candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not the target; balancing item for noncurrent assets.

variables.notes: Clear exact balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.row_label: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS AT THE END OF THE PERIOD
candidates.why: Cash and cash equivalents amount, but from cash flow rather than balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash balance but beginning-of-period, so less appropriate.
Cash movement, not ending cash balance.

variables.notes: Chose balance-sheet label outside shortlist because CHE should come from the balance sheet; 'Liquid funds' is the balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line and matches the cash-flow ending cash values.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Cash flow change item, not a balance-sheet stock.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong section and a balancing line.

variables.notes: Clear exact balance-sheet total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: Appears in the current-liabilities section and is the cleanest non-lease current debt line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Would normally capture current maturities, but explicitly includes leases and shows no values in preview.
Current debt-like item but lease liabilities should be excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Selected the current-section 'Interest-bearing liabilities' as short-term debt. Excluded lease-related rows per rule. Did not use 'Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases' because it explicitly includes leases.

candidates.why: Exact match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet net tangible fixed-asset/PPE line; preferable to gross or cash-flow capex rows.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Lease-related ROU asset, not baseline PPE preference.
Intangible, not PPE.
Cash flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the reported balance-sheet net tangible fixed assets line as the best PPE proxy. Avoided gross component rows and lease/ROU rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported operating cash flow total.

variables.notes: Selected the final reported operating cash flow total.
